query: SELECT c.id as company_id, c.name, u.id as camila_id, u.name FROM companies c LEFT JOIN users u ON u.companyId = c.id AND u.role = 'manager' WHERE c.name LIKE '%Baggio%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3eAQdaRY4zkjYsC.95a35ec57269 --database FWQUTMFHrecTsndnoBiUKo --execute SELECT c.id as company_id, c.name, u.id as camila_id, u.name FROM companies c LEFT JOIN users u ON u.companyId = c.id AND u.role = 'manager' WHERE c.name LIKE '%Baggio%';
